topics.title: User Profile and Package Page Inconsistency
topics.summary: A bug was reported regarding the discrepancy in the `downloads/week` statistics between user profile pages and individual package pages. This inconsistency affects both current and older packages, leading to confusion among users regarding the actual download counts.

topics.title: Community Engagement and Celebrations
topics.summary: The npmx community expressed joy and encouragement through a celebratory post, promoting positivity and engagement among users. This reflects the community's vibrant culture and the importance of fostering a supportive environment for developers and users alike.
